name: Tavern Table Tactics
short_description: Tavern Table Tactics is a tactical computer board game that combines a traditional two-player board game setting with tactical RPG combat.
detailed_description:
Tavern Table Tactics is a tactical computer tabletop game that combines a traditional two-player board game setting with tactical RPG combat.

Take turns battling a friend in this turn-based tactical computer board game to see who can claim bragging rights as the master tactician.

Features

  • 6 unique unit types at your disposal
  • Classic tactical RPG combat mechanics
  • Unique weapon and unit abilities to unleash at the opportune moment
  • Several game modes, each with their own objectives for victory
  • Single-player mode with strategy component planned for future release
